category_sources: source_facts.description says like cat but with syntax highlighting; official GitHub README says ccat is the colorizing cat and displays content with syntax highlighting.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is ccat; official GitHub repository and README heading use ccat.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README provides supported languages, installation, completion, and usage examples.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/owenthereal/ccat, so repo is returned as null per instruction not to second-guess existing repository values.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies syntax-highlighted cat behavior; official README lists supported languages and CLI usage examples.
